# FastGST

> FastGST provides a centralized, continuously updated GST Tax Lookup REST API for India's GST ecosystem, allowing developers and businesses to programmatically search HSN/SAC codes, retrieve GST rates, and navigate the tax classification hierarchy.

Important notes:

- FastGST is not an official government platform. It is an independent data aggregator that gathers public CBIC and GST Council updates on a best-effort basis.
- Under Section 22 of the CGST Act, FastGST operates without GST registration; thus, standard non-GST invoices are generated.
- The platform does not provide legal, tax, or professional accounting advice; statutory compliance verification against official gazettes remains the user's sole responsibility.
- The API is secured via API-key based authentication, with keys passed through the `X-API-Key` request header.

## Docs

- [API Documentation](https://docs.taxlookupapi.fastgst.in): Comprehensive developer guide containing requests, parameters, and quick-start code integration examples for multiple programming languages.
- [API Swagger](https://api.taxlookup.fastgst.in/swagger/index.html): Interactive Swagger UI portal to explore API parameters and test query responses directly from the browser.

## Examples

- [API Playground and Free HSN/SAC Rate Lookup Tool](https://www.fastgst.in/hsn-sac-finder/): Standard web implementation demonstrating the use of both fuzzy keyword searches and direct code lookups with full hierarchical display and tax breakdowns.

## Optional

- [ConsoleDesk Developer Marketplace](https://www.consoledesk.in/marketplace/tax-lookup-api): Dashboard to activate subscription plans, retrieve API keys, and monitor daily and monthly quotas.
